<p class="uo-runic" title="An Grav">An Grav</p>

<span class="uo-ascii">An Grav</span> — the words of power, shown above in the Britannian runic alphabet and here in the Ultima Online game typeface. Fifth Circle Magery.

Dispels a single field tile such as fire, poison, energy or paralyze fields, or a wall of stone.

## Casting requirements

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Circle | 5 (Fifth) |
| Mana cost | 14 |
| Minimum Magery | 37.1 (0% success below this) |
| Magery for 100% success | 77.1 |
| Reagents | Black Pearl, Spiders' Silk, Sulfurous Ash, Garlic |
| Words of power | <span class="uo-runic">An Grav</span> &nbsp; <span class="uo-ascii">An Grav</span> |

Casting from a scroll lowers the effective circle by two, reducing the skill
requirement (mana cost is unchanged).
